name: Get Projects
description: Retrieves a list of projects from a specified ACC account. If the user is an admin or executive, all projects are returned; otherwise, only assigned projects are retrieved. It supports filtering by various criteria like classification, platform, product, and more.
rate_limit: Not specified, typically rate-limited by requests per minute

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Must be Bearer <token>, where <token> is obtained via OAuth.

headers.name: Region
headers.description: Specifies the region where the request should be routed. Default is automatic.

headers.name: User-Id
headers.description: ID of the user acting on behalf of the request (optional). Required for Account Admin POST, PATCH, DELETE.

uri_parameters.name: accountId
uri_parameters.description: The unique account ID for the ACC account (UUID format).

query_parameters.name: fields
query_parameters.description: Comma-separated list of project fields to include in the response. Default is all fields.

query_parameters.name: filter[classification]
query_parameters.description: Filter projects by classification (e.g., production, template, component, sample).

query_parameters.name: filter[platform]
query_parameters.description: Filter by platform (ACC or BIM 360).

query_parameters.name: filter[products]
query_parameters.description: Filter by products used in the projects.

query_parameters.name: filter[name]
query_parameters.description: Filter projects by name. Supports partial matches.

query_parameters.name: filter[type]
query_parameters.description: Filter projects by type (e.g., Airport, Bridge, Stadium).

query_parameters.name: filter[status]
query_parameters.description: Filter projects by status (e.g., active, pending, archived).

query_parameters.name: filter[businessUnitId]
query_parameters.description: Filter projects by business unit ID.

query_parameters.name: filter[jobNumber]
query_parameters.description: Filter by user-defined project identifier.

query_parameters.name: filter[updatedAt]
query_parameters.description: Filter projects updated within a specific date range in ISO 8601 format.

query_parameters.name: filterTextMatch
query_parameters.description: Defines how text-based filters should match results (e.g., contains, startsWith, equals).

query_parameters.name: sort
query_parameters.description: Sort results by fields (e.g., name, startDate, createdAt).

query_parameters.name: limit
query_parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return. Default is 20.

query_parameters.name: offset
query_parameters.description: Pagination offset to fetch the next set of results.

status_codes.200: OK - Successfully retrieved a list of projects.
status_codes.400: Bad Request - Invalid syntax or malformed request.
status_codes.401: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication credentials.
status_codes.404: Not Found - Resource not found.
status_codes.429: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error - Server-side error.
status_codes.503: Service Unavailable - The service is unavailable.

name: Get Project by ID
description: Retrieves a project specified by its project ID. Compatible with both BIM 360 and Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC) projects. The project ID can be obtained by calling GET /accounts/{accountId}/projects.
rate_limit: Not specified, typically rate-limited by requests per minute

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Must be Bearer <token>, where <token> is obtained via either a two-legged or three-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: Region
headers.description: Specifies the region where the request should be routed. Default is automatic.

headers.name: User-Id
headers.description: The ID of a user on whose behalf the request is being made. Optional for GET requests.

uri_parameters.name: projectId
uri_parameters.description: The unique ID of the project to retrieve (UUID format). For projects in the Data Management API, remove the 'b.' prefix to obtain the ACC project ID.

query_parameters.name: fields
query_parameters.description: Comma-separated list of project fields to include in the response. Default is all fields. Options include: accountId, addressLine1, businessUnitId, city, companyCount, constructionType, country, createdAt, deliveryMethod, endDate, imageUrl, jobNumber, latitude, longitude, memberCount, name, platform, postalCode, products, projectValue, sheetCount, startDate, stateOrProvince, status, thumbnailImageUrl, timezone, type, updatedAt.

status_codes.200: OK - Successfully retrieved the project.
status_codes.400: Bad Request - The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax.
status_codes.403: Forbidden - The server understood the request but refuses to authorize it.
status_codes.404: Not Found - The project was not found.
status_codes.406: Not Acceptable - The server cannot produce a response matching the acceptable values.
status_codes.409: Conflict - The request could not be completed due to a conflict with the current state of the resource.
status_codes.410: Gone - The requested resource is no longer available.
status_codes.429: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error - An unexpected error occurred on the server.
status_codes.503: Service Unavailable - The service is unavailable.

name: Get Photos or Videos by Filter
description: Searches for and returns specified media (photo or video) within a project, visible to the authenticated user. It accepts various optional filters, such as creation date, media type, and title. The endpoint supports pagination, and if a pagination token is provided, it continues returning results from where the previous response left off.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via a three-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: application/json

uri_parameters.name: projectId
uri_parameters.description: Unique identifier of the project.

cursorState.description: An opaque cursor token used for paginated results. If not provided, the query will return the first page of results.

createdAt.description: Filter by the creation date of the media. This can be a single date or a date range in the format YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.SSSZ..YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.SSSZ.

id.description: List of media IDs to filter by.

include.description: Additional fields to include in the response, such as 'signedUrls'.

limit.description: The maximum number of objects returned per page. Defaults to 25, max is 50.

sort.description: Define sorting order. Provide field (e.g., createdAt, takenAt) and direction (e.g., 'asc' or 'desc').

status_codes.400: Bad Request — The request was malformed or missing required parameters.
status_codes.403: Forbidden — Invalid or missing authentication credentials.

results.title: string
results.processingState: enum (PROCESSING, AUDITING, ROTATING, READY, FAILED, PUBLISHING)

name: Publish Review Sheets
description: Publishes all uploaded review sheets with a `READY` status. Sheets with a `FAILED` status are ignored. Check review sheet processing status before publishing.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via a 2-legged or 3-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: x-user-id
headers.description: Optional unless using 2-legged OAuth with user impersonation. Accepts Autodesk ID or ACC ID.

uri_parameters.name: projectId
uri_parameters.description: The UUID of the project. Can include or exclude the 'b.' prefix.

uri_parameters.name: uploadId
uri_parameters.description: The ID of the upload whose review sheets are being published.

status_codes.202: Accepted — The request was accepted and publishing has started.
status_codes.404: Not Found — Resource not found.
status_codes.429: Too Many Requests — Rate limit exceeded.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error — Something went wrong on the server.

name: Get Review Sheet Thumbnails
description: Retrieves thumbnails for specified review sheets. Thumbnails are stored in AWS S3 and expire 30 days after upload creation. The signed URLs in the response expire in 1 hour.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via a 2-legged or 3-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: x-user-id
headers.description: Optional unless using 2-legged OAuth with user impersonation. Accepts Autodesk ID or ACC ID.

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: Must be application/json

uri_parameters.name: projectId
uri_parameters.description: The UUID of the project. Can include or exclude the 'b.' prefix.

uri_parameters.name: uploadId
uri_parameters.description: The ID of the upload from which to retrieve thumbnails.

reviewSheetIds.description: IDs of the review sheets you want thumbnails for (max 100).

type.description: Thumbnail size: big (512px), small (256px), or tiny (64px).

status_codes.200: OK — Successfully retrieved thumbnails.
status_codes.404: Not Found — Resource not found or thumbnails expired.
status_codes.429: Too Many Requests — Rate limit exceeded.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error — Unexpected server error.

name: List Sheets in Project
description: Retrieves sheets from a project. By default, only the latest versions of sheets are returned. You can retrieve all versions, filter by version set, tags, or sheet collections, and paginate the results.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via a 2-legged or 3-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: x-user-id
headers.description: Optional unless using 2-legged OAuth with user impersonation. Accepts Autodesk ID or ACC ID.

uri_parameters.name: projectId
uri_parameters.description: The UUID of the project. Can include or exclude the 'b.' prefix.

query_parameters.name: currentOnly
query_parameters.description: true to return only the most recent versions. false to return all versions. Defaults to true unless filter[versionSetId] is set.

query_parameters.name: filter[versionSetId]
query_parameters.description: Filter by version set ID.

query_parameters.name: filter[tags]
query_parameters.description: Filter by tags. Multiple tags return sheets that match all.

query_parameters.name: fields
query_parameters.description: Limit fields returned (e.g., fields=id&fields=number).

query_parameters.name: searchText
query_parameters.description: Case-sensitive search by sheet number or title.

query_parameters.name: withAllTags
query_parameters.description: true to return sheets with all specified tags. Not valid with __UNTAGGED.

query_parameters.name: isDeleted
query_parameters.description: true to return deleted sheets only. Default is false.

query_parameters.name: offset
query_parameters.description: Result offset. Default is 0.

query_parameters.name: limit
query_parameters.description: Number of results to return. Range: 1–100. Default is 100.

query_parameters.name: collectionId
query_parameters.description: Filter by collection UUID, or use '*' for all collections.

status_codes.200: OK — Successfully retrieved the list of sheets.
status_codes.404: Not Found — Resource not found.
status_codes.429: Too Many Requests — Rate limit exceeded.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error — Unexpected server error.

name: Batch Get Sheets by IDs
description: Retrieves detailed information for a list of sheets in a specified project by providing their IDs. This endpoint is not compatible with BIM 360 projects.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via a 2-legged or 3-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: x-user-id
headers.description: Optional unless using 2-legged OAuth with user impersonation. Accepts Autodesk ID or ACC ID.

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: Must be application/json

uri_parameters.name: projectId
uri_parameters.description: The UUID of the project. Can be prefixed with or without 'b.'.

ids.description: Array of sheet IDs to retrieve. Maximum: 200 IDs.

status_codes.200: OK — Successfully retrieved the sheets.
status_codes.404: Not Found — Some or all requested sheets not found.
status_codes.429: Too Many Requests — Rate limit exceeded.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error — An error occurred on the server.

name: Batch Update Sheets
description: Updates a list of sheets in a project. You can update multiple sheet tags, but only one sheet number and one title at a time. Not compatible with BIM 360 projects.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via 2-legged or 3-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: x-user-id
headers.description: Optional unless using 2-legged OAuth with user impersonation. Accepts Autodesk ID or ACC ID.

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: Must be application/json

uri_parameters.name: projectId
uri_parameters.description: The UUID of the project. Can be prefixed with or without 'b.'.

ids.description: Array of sheet IDs to update. Maximum: 200 IDs.

number.description: New sheet number. Only one sheet number can be updated at a time.

title.description: New sheet title. Only one sheet title can be updated at a time.

tags.description: Tags to update for the sheets.

status_codes.200: OK — Sheets updated successfully.
status_codes.404: Not Found — One or more sheets not found.
status_codes.409: Conflict — Conflict with current state of target resource.
status_codes.429: Too Many Requests — Rate limit exceeded.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error — Unexpected error on server.

name: Batch Delete Sheets
description: Deletes a list of sheets in a project. To restore deleted sheets, use the `sheets:batch-restore` endpoint. Not compatible with BIM 360 projects.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via 2-legged or 3-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: x-user-id
headers.description: Optional unless using 2-legged OAuth with user impersonation. Accepts Autodesk ID or ACC ID.

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: Must be application/json

uri_parameters.name: projectId
uri_parameters.description: UUID of the project. Can be prefixed with or without 'b.'.

ids.description: Array of sheet IDs to delete. Max 200 items.

status_codes.404: Not Found — One or more sheets not found.
status_codes.429: Too Many Requests — Rate limit exceeded.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error — Unexpected error on server.

name: Batch Restore Deleted Sheets
description: Restores deleted sheets to their original version sets. Sheet numbers must be unique within a version set. If a sheet with the same number exists, the restore will fail for that sheet. Not compatible with BIM 360 projects.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via 2-legged or 3-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: x-user-id
headers.description: Optional unless using 2-legged OAuth with user impersonation. Accepts Autodesk ID or ACC ID.

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: Must be application/json

uri_parameters.name: projectId
uri_parameters.description: UUID of the project. Can be prefixed with or without 'b.'.

ids.description: Array of sheet IDs to restore. Max 200 items. Use GET sheets with isDeleted=true to retrieve deleted sheet IDs.

status_codes.200: OK — Sheets restored successfully.
status_codes.404: Not Found — Sheets not found.
status_codes.409: Conflict — A sheet with the same number exists in the version set.
status_codes.429: Too Many Requests — Rate limit exceeded.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error — Unexpected server error.

name: Export Sheets to PDF
description: Initiates an asynchronous export job that combines up to 1000 sheets into a downloadable PDF. Supports exporting markups (standard, issue, photo), published/unpublished states, and links to other project resources. Returns a job ID to poll for status and download URL.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via 2-legged or 3-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: x-user-id
headers.description: Optional unless using 2-legged OAuth with user impersonation. Accepts Autodesk ID or ACC ID.

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: Must be application/json

uri_parameters.name: projectId
uri_parameters.description: UUID of the project. Can be prefixed with or without 'b.'.

outputFileName.description: The desired name of the generated file (excluding extension). Max 255 characters.

sheets.description: Array of sheet UUIDs to include in the export. Max 1000 items.

standardMarkups.description: Options for standard markups and their links.

issueMarkups.description: Options for issue markups to include.

photoMarkups.description: Options for photo markups to include.

status_codes.202: Accepted — Export job created. Response includes export job ID.
status_codes.400: Bad Request — Invalid parameters. Common errors: failed token parse, missing user ID.
status_codes.403: Forbidden — User or token lacks necessary permissions.
status_codes.404: Not Found — Project, user, or sheet not found.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error — Unexpected error on the server.

name: Get Export Job Status
description: Retrieves the status of a PDF sheet export job and the signed URL required to download the exported file once the process is complete. The URL will be valid for 1 hour. If expired, a new export must be initiated.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via 2-legged or 3-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: x-user-id
headers.description: Optional unless using 2-legged OAuth with user impersonation. Accepts Autodesk ID or ACC ID.

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: Must be application/json

uri_parameters.name: projectId
uri_parameters.description: UUID of the project. Can be prefixed with or without 'b.'.

uri_parameters.name: exportId
uri_parameters.description: UUID of the export job, returned after calling POST exports.

status_codes.200: OK — Successfully retrieved export status and signed URL.
status_codes.403: Forbidden — Lack of permissions for the user to access the resource.
status_codes.404: Not Found — The project, export job, or resource was not found.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error — Unknown error on the server.

output.description: A signed URL to download the PDF (valid for 1 hour).

error.description: Error details if the job failed.

name: Get All Project Collections
description: Retrieves information about all collections in a specified project. Collections can help organize sheets, and this endpoint allows you to fetch all the collections in a project. You can use the GET sheets API to retrieve sheets associated with a specific collection.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via 2-legged or 3-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: x-user-id
headers.description: Optional unless using 2-legged OAuth with user impersonation. Accepts Autodesk ID or ACC ID.

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: Must be application/json

uri_parameters.name: projectId
uri_parameters.description: UUID of the project. Can be prefixed with or without 'b.'.

query_parameters.name: offset
query_parameters.description: Starting point for the results, specified by item number. Default is 0. Use offset=3 to start from the third item.

query_parameters.name: limit
query_parameters.description: The number of results to return. This controls how many collections to retrieve.

status_codes.200: OK — Successfully retrieved the collections data.
status_codes.403: Forbidden — Lack of permissions for the user to access the resource.
status_codes.404: Not Found — The project or collection does not exist.
status_codes.500: Internal Server Error — Unknown error on the server.

name: Get Collection by ID
description: Retrieves a specific collection by its unique ID. You can use this endpoint to get details about a collection and the associated sheets. To retrieve all sheets within a collection, you can use the GET sheets API.
